title: BHN: A Brain-like Heterogeneous Network
abstract: The human brain works in an unsupervised way, and more than one brain region is essential for lighting up intelligence. Inspired by this, we propose a brain-like heterogeneous network (BHN), which can cooperatively learn a lot of distributed representations and one global attention representation. By optimizing distributed, self-supervised, and gradient-isolated objective functions in a minimax fashion, our model improves its representations, which are generated from patches of pictures or frames of videos in experiments.
comment: Improve the readability, and add an image experiment
